# blinkX DS V1

## Purpose

blinkX DS V1 is a Storybook-based design system documentation project for blinkX. It documents foundation tokens and interactive components with light and dark theme variants, Figma-aligned component properties, live previews, galleries, and downloadable markdown specs.

## Public URLs

- GitHub repository: https://github.com/vrundar1915/blinkx-ds-v1
- Raw AI context file: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vrundar1915/blinkx-ds-v1/main/llms.txt
- Live Storybook: https://blinkx-ds-v1.vercel.app
- Live AI context file: https://blinkx-ds-v1.vercel.app/llms.txt

## Guidance For AI Agents

- Start with this file, then inspect `README.md`, `package.json`, `src/`, and `public/*.md`.
- For web-only fetch tools, use raw GitHub file URLs, not the `.git` clone URL.
- For full code access, clone `https://github.com/vrundar1915/blinkx-ds-v1.git`.
- Use the markdown files in `public/` as the human-readable design specs.
- Use the React and CSS files in `src/components/` as the source of truth for interactive component behavior.
- Use the token files in `src/foundation/` as the source of truth for foundation values.
- The project uses React, TypeScript, Vite, Storybook, and Vercel.

## Install And Run

```bash
npm install
npm run storybook
```

Storybook runs locally at `http://127.0.0.1:6006`.

## Build

```bash
npm run build-storybook
```

Vercel uses:

- Build command: `npm run build-storybook`
- Output directory: `storybook-static`

## Main Source Areas

| Area | Path | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Components | `src/components/` | Interactive React components and Storybook stories. |
| Foundation tokens | `src/foundation/` | Color, typography, spacing, radius, and shadow token pages. |
| Downloadable specs | `public/*.md` | Markdown specs exposed by Storybook download CTAs. |
| Storybook config | `.storybook/` | Manager branding, preview config, addons, and Storybook behavior. |
| Vercel config | `vercel.json` | Production deployment settings. |

## Foundation Docs

| Topic | Markdown spec |
| --- | --- |
| Primitive colors | `public/blinkx-primitive-colors.md` |
| Semantic colors | `public/blinkx-semantic-colors.md` |
| Typography | `public/blinkx-typography.md` |
| Spacing | `public/blinkx-spacing.md` |
| Radius | `public/blinkx-radius.md` |
| Drop shadow | `public/blinkx-drop-shadow.md` |

## Component Docs

| Component | Markdown spec | Source files |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Brand button | `public/blinkx-brand-buttons.md` | `src/components/BlinkXButton.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXButton.css`, `src/components/Buttons.stories.tsx` |
| Buy/Sell button | `public/blinkx-buy-sell-buttons.md` | `src/components/BlinkXBuySellButton.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXBuySellButton.css`, `src/components/BuySellButtons.stories.tsx` |
| Radio | `public/blinkx-radio.md` | `src/components/BlinkXRadio.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXRadio.css`, `src/components/Radio.stories.tsx` |
| Checkbox | `public/blinkx-checkbox.md` | `src/components/BlinkXCheckbox.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXCheckbox.css`, `src/components/Checkbox.stories.tsx` |
| Segment | `public/blinkx-segment.md` | `src/components/BlinkXSegment.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXSegment.css`, `src/components/Segment.stories.tsx` |
| Toggle | `public/blinkx-toggle.md` | `src/components/BlinkXToggle.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXToggle.css`, `src/components/Toggle.stories.tsx` |
| Tooltip | `public/blinkx-tooltip.md` | `src/components/BlinkXTooltip.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXTooltip.css`, `src/components/Tooltip.stories.tsx` |
| Tab | `public/blinkx-tab.md` | `src/components/BlinkXTab.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXTab.css`, `src/components/Tab.stories.tsx` |
| Chips | `public/blinkx-chips.md` | `src/components/BlinkXChip.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXChip.css`, `src/components/Chips.stories.tsx` |
| Quick Action Bar | `public/blinkx-quick-action-bar.md` | `src/components/BlinkXQuickActionBar.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXQuickActionBar.css`, `src/components/QuickActionBar.stories.tsx` |
| Loader | `public/blinkx-loader.md` | `src/components/BlinkXLoader.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXLoader.css`, `src/components/Loader.stories.tsx` |
| Toast Message | `public/blinkx-toast-message.md` | `src/components/BlinkXToast.tsx`, `src/components/BlinkXToast.css`, `src/components/Toast.stories.tsx` |

## Design System Conventions

- Font family: Barlow.
- Dominant brand action color: `#171EFD`.
- Dark surface color: `#1A1E23`.
- Dark border color commonly uses `#33373B`.
- Components should expose the same component properties that the Storybook controls show.
- Component code blocks should describe implementation-only code for dev handoff, not Storybook control UI.
- Light and dark theme values should be preserved separately.

## Best Link To Share With AI

Use this prompt:

```text
Use this public repo and AI context file:
https://github.com/vrundar1915/blinkx-ds-v1
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vrundar1915/blinkx-ds-v1/main/llms.txt

Review the Storybook design system, inspect the markdown specs in public/, and use the component source files in src/components/ as implementation reference.
```
